credentials.title: Invalid or missing credentials
credentials.description: Authentication failed for the Email Builder. Please check BEEFREE_CLIENT_ID and BEEFREE_CLIENT_SECRET in .env.
credentials.step1: Go to the Beefree Developer Console and create an application.
credentials.step2: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret into your .env file.
credentials.step3: Reload this page or click Retry.

mltWarning.title: Multi-language Templates may not be enabled
mltWarning.plan: Your current plan does not include Multi-language Templates. This feature requires a Superpowers or Enterprise plan.
mltWarning.unknown: The plan could not be determined from the authentication token. This is unexpected — please inspect the JWT payload in the browser console and verify that the token contains a valid 'plan' field.

mltTip.title: Your plan supports the Multi-language Templates feature...
mltTip.tip1: ...but it won't show until enabled for your application in the Beefree SDK Console. Check the
